full_text:
Sang Hongyang 桑弘羊
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sang Hongyang (桑弘羊). Sang Hongyang, Western Han official, famed for state monopolies on salt and iron; executed in 80 BCE. Sang Hongyang was affiliated with the Western Han Dynasty. Sang Hongyang lived during the Former Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
